# Token selection

Choose tokens by design intent. Prefer semantic roles when available, then use primitive values only when no semantic role fits.
The stylesheet contains 351 exported variables. This file does not repeat the full catalog; use the focused foundation files for decisions and the generated stylesheet for the exact complete custom-property inventory.

## Decision routes
- Read `foundations/color.md` for surfaces, foregrounds, borders, icons, and status color roles.
- Read `foundations/typography.md` before choosing type values.
- Read `foundations/spacing-and-layout.md` before choosing spacing, radius, or border values.
- Read `foundations/elevation.md` before choosing elevation.
